title: THE Server Season 3 - Companion Modpack
description: A companion modpack for "THE Server" Season 3 - an invite only server
body:
A companion modpack for "THE Server," an invite only server. It contains Simple Voice Chat, performance mods, and is shader-ready. This modpack is not required to join THE Server. Extra resource packs for quality of life are included.

## Mod Content
- Simple Voice Chat
- Iris and Sodium
- Xaero's Minimap
- AppleSkin
- Some extras

## Use on other servers

If you want you can. However, the content on this modpack are subject to change.

## "Splat Modpack"
This modpack was once called Splat Modpack, but has since been rebranded to match newer seasons.
